title: Slay the Streamer 2
description:
Twitch and YouTube chat votes on the streamer's choices: run start (act variant), Neow and mid-run Ancient events, card rewards, and act bosses. Inspired by Tempus's Slay the Streamer for StS1.

Chat votes with 0-indexed options (#0, #1, #2, ...). Configuration lives in %APPDATA%\SlayTheSpire2\slay_the_streamer_2.json and in the in-game Mods screen once connected.

Setup guide and README: https://github.com/Surfinite/slay-the-streamer-2
changeNote: Initial upload: v0.1.3, built against game v0.108.0.
